overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Harry Potter-style game showing a student character in a wizarding school uniform exploring a circular Gryffindor dormitory tower. The room features stone walls, wooden floors, four-poster beds, and warm firelight from a cast iron stove, with the camera following the character as they walk around the space and briefly look up at the wooden ceiling beams.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gryffindor dormitory with four-poster beds and central stove

events.description: interaction prompt appears for a Level II locked chest at the foot of a bed

agents.ego_description: walking around the circular dormitory, examining the four-poster beds and furniture

entered.detail: dark wood four-poster bed with red curtains and bedding
black cast iron wood-burning stove with glowing embers inside
large wooden door with stone Gothic archway frame
upholstered red armchair near the stone wall
tall dark wood wardrobe with clothes hanging nearby
circular patterned rug on the wooden floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a warm, firelit circular dormitory with stone walls and wooden floors. Dark wood four-poster beds with red hangings are arranged around the room, and a cast iron stove glows in the center. The character approaches a locked chest, triggering an interaction prompt.

scene_state.functional_zone: dormitory ceiling with exposed wooden beams

events.description: camera tilts upward to examine the wooden ceiling structure
camera tilts back down to resume normal viewing angle

agents.ego_description: looking up at the architectural details of the ceiling

entered.detail: thick wooden support beams crossing the circular ceiling
radial wooden planks forming a conical ceiling structure
lit lantern suspended from the ceiling beam

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal the dormitory's impressive wooden ceiling architecture, showing thick crossing beams and radial planks forming a conical roof. A hanging lantern provides warm light from above before the camera returns to normal level.

scene_state.functional_zone: dormitory entrance area with stacked books and main door

events.description: NPC student becomes visible sitting on a bed near the door

agents.ego_description: walking toward the main wooden door at the far end of the dormitory

notable_agents.action: sitting on the bed near the stacked books and portrait

entered.detail: heavy wooden door with metal studs at the room entrance
tall piles of books stacked beside the bed
framed painting hanging on the stone wall
large wire birdcage on a stand

segments.scene_description: The character walks toward the main entrance of the dormitory, passing a birdcage and approaching a heavy wooden door. An NPC student sits on a bed near tall stacks of books and a framed portrait. The cast iron stove is now visible in the background to the left as the character nears the exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a cozy, firelit dormitory that shifts from an intimate exploration of the room's interior to a focused path toward the exit. It begins with the character navigating a circular space of stone walls and wooden floors, passing red-curtained four-poster beds and a glowing cast iron stove before pausing at a locked chest. As the character stops, the camera tilts upward to reveal the intricate architecture of the conical wooden ceiling and its radial beams illuminated by a hanging lantern. The view then returns to eye level as the character moves away from the stove, passing a birdcage and a student seated near stacks of books and a framed portrait. Finally, the camera follows the character as they approach the heavy wooden door leading out of the dormitory.
